creator: jhanna@shaw.ca
text:
On 14-Nov-2006 Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/spin,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/105501 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/105501
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

I sent the pr. I guess I forgot to label it a maintainer-update.


Jonathan Hanna <jhanna@shaw.ca>
